arts.ttl: Lazio Player Ratings vs Nice: Beast Mode Castellanos
arts.sum: Lazio striker Taty Castellanos was unanimously crowned as the Man of the Match in his side’s 4-1 pummeling of Nice. The Biancocelesti seized the top spot in the Europa League table with a second large victory in a row, this time in front of their home supporters at the Stadio Olimpico in Rome.
